description: A customer wants to get an estimated value for their current vehicle as a trade-in.

nodes.task_description: Gather details of the customer's current vehicle: VIN, make, model, year, mileage, and general condition.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent collects all required vehicle information.

nodes.task_description: Use the VIN to look up the vehicle's history report for accidents or damage.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves the history report and notes a minor accident from two years ago.

nodes.task_description: Provide an estimated trade-in value range based on market data, explaining that the final value requires a physical inspection.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a realistic value range and clearly sets expectations for the final appraisal.
